tagline: Tampa Bay's Trusted Custom Pool Builder

hero.headline: Your Dream Pool, Built the Right Way
hero.subheadline: For 18 years, Tampa Bay families have trusted Larsen's Pool & Spa to design and build pools that turn backyards into personal resorts. Owner-operated, award-winning craftsmanship, and a Golden Rule promise that your project gets the care it deserves.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Custom Pools & Renovations That<br class="hidden md:block"> Transform Your Backyard
services.subtitle: From first sketch to final splash, Larsen's handles every detail. Our dedicated project managers keep you informed daily so you can enjoy the excitement of watching your dream pool come to life.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Residential shotcrete pools designed around your lifestyle and built by experienced crews with structured project management from first dig to final splash.

cards.title: Pool Renovation & Remodeling
cards.description: Complete renovations including resurfacing, retiling, coping replacement, PebbleTec finishes, deck upgrades, and equipment modernization — often in just weeks, not months.

cards.title: Custom Water Features
cards.description: Waterfalls, spillovers, bubblers, and fountains designed to elevate your pool's aesthetics and create the soothing ambiance of a luxury resort.

cards.title: Fire Features & Fire Bowls
cards.description: Dramatic fire bowls, fire pits, and fire-and-water combinations that transform your outdoor living space into a show-stopping evening retreat.

cards.title: 3D Pool Design & Visualization
cards.description: Advanced 3D digital renderings let you walk through your complete backyard project before a single shovel hits the ground. See it before you build it.

cards.title: Pool Service & Warranty
cards.description: Ongoing pool service, equipment repair, and responsive warranty support from certified pool operators who stand behind every project we deliver.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Backyard Paradise in Three Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Design Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your dream backyard. We'll visit your home, listen to your vision, and begin crafting a custom 3D design that brings your ideas to life — no obligation.

steps.title: See Your Pool Before It's Built
steps.description: Review stunning 3D renderings of your complete project. Your dedicated designer refines every detail until the design is exactly what you envisioned. Then we lock in transparent pricing.

steps.title: Relax While We Build
steps.description: Your project manager provides daily photo updates through our client app. We handle every permit, inspection, and detail so you can simply watch your dream pool take shape.

about.label: Why Tampa Bay Trusts Larsen's
about.headline: Built on the Golden Rule — Your Pool Deserves That Standard
about.description: Founded 18 years ago by Eric Larsen, our company was born from a simple belief: pool builders should treat every client the way they'd want to be treated. Eric entered the industry at a young age, mastering service, repairs, remodeling, and construction before launching Larsen's Pool & Spa. Today, our team of dedicated designers and project managers maintains direct communication with every client throughout the build. We never overextend our capacity because quality matters more than volume.

features.title: Owner Involved on Every Project
features.description: Eric Larsen personally oversees every build. You'll never be handed off to subcontractors who don't know your name or your vision.

features.title: Daily Updates via Client App
features.description: Your dedicated project manager sends daily photo documentation and progress updates so you always know exactly where your project stands.

features.title: Award-Winning Craftsmanship
features.description: PHTA International Awards of Excellence recipient, Angi Super Service Award winner since 2010, and Best of Florida 2025. Our work speaks for itself.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed, itemized proposal after your 3D design consultation. What we quote is what you pay — no hidden fees, no change-order games.

guarantee.headline: Our "Golden Rule" Promise
guarantee.description: We build every pool as if it were going in our own backyard. If any aspect of your project doesn't meet the standard we agreed upon, we'll make it right at our expense. That's not a policy — it's the principle Eric Larsen built this company on 18 years ago, and it's why 192+ families have trusted us with a 4.9-star rating.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build typically take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pools are completed in 8-12 weeks depending on design complexity and permitting timelines. Our structured project management keeps builds on schedule — many clients are surprised how quickly their pool takes shape. You'll receive daily updates so you always know where things stand.

faqs.question: Do I get to see my pool design before construction starts?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Every client receives detailed 3D digital renderings of their complete backyard project before we break ground. You'll be able to virtually walk through your pool and patio, adjust features, and approve every detail before construction begins.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Tampa Bay?
faqs.answer: We serve the Greater Tampa Bay Area including Pinellas County, Hillsborough County, Pasco County, Northern Manatee County, and Southern Hernando County. If you're unsure whether you're in our service area, give us a call and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: How is Larsen's different from other pool builders?
faqs.answer: Owner Eric Larsen is personally involved in every project — you'll never be handed off to anonymous subcontractors. We assign a dedicated project manager who communicates daily, we use advanced 3D design visualization, and we never overextend our capacity. Quality over quantity, every time.

faqs.question: Do you handle pool renovations and remodels too?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pool renovation is one of our specialties. Whether you need resurfacing, retiling, new coping, PebbleTec or PebbleSheen finishes, deck upgrades, or full equipment modernization, we handle it all. Many renovation projects are completed in just a few weeks.

testimonials.name: Joe R.
testimonials.text: This was our fourth pool and the best experience we have ever had building a pool. The entire Larsen's team was professional, communicative, and delivered a stunning result on time.

testimonials.name: Julie D.
testimonials.text: Larsen's is the creme de la creme of pool companies. They completed our project ahead of schedule and the quality exceeded every expectation we had. Cannot recommend them enough.

testimonials.name: Rob P.
testimonials.text: Our previous company took 17 weeks on a smaller project. Larsen's completed our bigger remodel in just 4 weeks. Night and day difference in communication, quality, and professionalism.
